items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that fixes require() calls, supporting JavaScript and TypeScript modules, enabling easy invocation, and adding code buttons for enhanced scripting capabilities.

items.content_html: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window. So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid. Enjoy it!
items.title: gitcpy/mermaid-zoom-drag: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window.  So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid.  Enjoy it!

items.content_html: ML Vault 📘: A collaborative Obsidian vault for sharing and exploring AI and ML knowledge. Join us as we build, discuss, and contribute to a rich resource of notes, tutorials, and insights 🚀. Perfect for both beginners and experts 🧠. Features integration with Git 🔄, Zotero 📚, and Templater 🛠 plugins.
items.title: AlexandreManai/ml_vault: ML Vault 📘: A collaborative Obsidian vault for sharing and exploring AI and ML knowledge. Join us as we build, discuss, and contribute to a rich resource of notes, tutorials, and insights 🚀. Perfect for both beginners and experts 🧠. Features integration with Git 🔄, Zotero 📚, and Templater 🛠 plugins.
